title: PATH-hijack subprocess execution
rationale: partial executable path in subprocess enables PATH hijack in compromised runner

title: Untrusted subprocess execution surface
rationale: subprocess calls without explicit trust boundary widen command-injection blast radius

title: Direct subprocess usage without policy guard
rationale: raw subprocess usage bypasses centralized execution policy and audit hooks

title: Runtime assert used as security control
rationale: assert can be stripped with optimization and must not enforce safety

title: Hardcoded secret-like literal
rationale: embedded secret-like literals increase credential disclosure risk

title: Concentrated operational risk in scripts/
rationale: risk clusters in operational scripts create repeatable exploit surface

title: Runtime library risk in src/
rationale: runtime modules carrying findings propagate risk into production paths
